lines.speaker: Thrander
lines.text: Welcome to the Realm of Memories, [player name].

lines.speaker: Thrander
lines.text: I am Thrander. Long ago, I used to live in Varrock, converting plate armour. For example, if you'd got a plate skirt, but you preferred leggings instead, I'd convert it, free of charge.

lines.speaker: Thrander
lines.text: Maybe retiring was a mistake. If the world ever wanted me again, I could come out of retirement and offer my services as before. Though people might fret about the economic impact if I did.

sections.title: Using platelegs or a plateskirt on Thrander

lines.speaker: Thrander
lines.text: If you're hoping I'll convert your armour into a different item for you, I'm afraid I don't do that sort of thing now.
